scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @formation-chat-core/protocol && npm run build --workspace @formation-chat-core/server-sdk && npm run build --workspace @formation-chat-core/browser-client && npm run build --workspace @formation-chat-core/haystack-connector && npm run build --workspace @formation-chat-core/mock-connector && npm run build --workspace @formation-chat-core/server && npm run build --workspace @formation-chat-core/ui-react && npm run build --workspace @formation-chat-core/dashboard && npm run build --workspace @formation-chat-core/cloudflare-worker-example && npm run build --workspace @formation-chat-core/local-chat-example
scripts.lint: eslint . && npm run lint --workspaces --if-present && npm run format:check
